title: ochna hackarsii
intro: Ochna hackarsii, also known as the bird's egg tree, is a plant species in the family Ochnaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ochna hackarsii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and have antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
